settings.editor: Personalized smile makeovers crafted just for you

As your trusted cosmetic dentist in Summit, Dr. Bandeff combines artistry with advanced dental expertise to help your smile shine its brightest. Using state-of-the-art technology and an artistic eye, we craft personalized smile transformations that look naturally beautiful. Whether you're seeking subtle enhancements or a complete smile makeover, our comfort-focused approach ensures a relaxing experience with stunning results.

settings.title: Your Path to a Perfect Smile

Straighten your teeth discreetly with comfortable clear aligners customized for your smile goals. Digital planning ensures precise results while maintaining your professional appearance throughout treatment.
Alternative clear orthodontic options to help you achieve a straighter smile comfortably and conveniently, with treatment plans tailored to your specific needs.
Replace missing teeth with permanent solutions that look, feel, and function like natural teeth. Our advanced digital planning ensures optimal placement and aesthetics.

settings.editor:
Transform more than just your smile - boost your confidence and quality of life with cosmetic dentistry. Our treatments enhance both beauty and function, using premium materials and advanced techniques for results that stand the test of time. At Summit Family & Cosmetic Dentistry, we are dedicated to providing personalized care that meets your unique needs.

  • Boost confidence in personal & professional life
  • Achieve natural-looking, lasting results
  • Improve facial aesthetics & appearance
  • Strengthen the overall dental function

Investing in your smile creates positive impacts that extend far beyond the dental chair, enhancing every aspect of your daily interactions.

Your smile transformation begins with a comprehensive consultation where we discuss your goals and create a personalized treatment plan. Using digital imaging technology, we can show you potential results before treatment begins. Every procedure is tailored to your unique facial features and aesthetic preferences. At Summit Family & Cosmetic Dentistry, we are dedicated to providing you with the highest quality care throughout your journey to a beautiful smile.

We prioritize your comfort throughout treatment, offering our signature comfort menu options to ensure a relaxing experience. Our artistic approach and attention to detail ensure natural-looking results that complement your features while achieving your desired outcome. At Summit Family & Cosmetic Dentistry, we are dedicated to providing personalized care that exceeds your expectations.

At Summit Family & Cosmetic Dentistry, every patient receives a customized treatment plan based on their goals, concerns, and health history. Dr. Bandeff and his team believe that informed patients are confident patients, taking the time to walk through every option before any procedure begins. From routine checkups to full-mouth restorations, you receive the same attentive, personal care every visit.
